text: About Skip to the content The University of Texas/Texas A&M Investment Management Company Contact Search the site UTIMCO Menu Search the site Home About Board Of Directors Our Team UTIMCO Mission & Impact Open Records Request Business Continuity Plan Funds Managed Reports Meeting Resources Policies Institution Access Careers Contact Search the site About UTIMCO Our Legacy of Success UTIMCO is focused on fulfilling one specific task:  To maintain our legacy of success, we continue to build a superior long-term investment strategy that will provide increasing levels of purchasing power for scholarships, teaching, research and other educational programs of The University of Texas and The Texas A&M University Systems.   Our Vision We strive to be the world’s leading endowment fund, making a lasting positive impact on the future of Texas and beyond. Who We Are UTIMCO is a not-for-profit corporation modeled after investment management companies organized by Harvard, Princeton, Stanford, and Duke Universities to invest their respective assets.  It was the first investment corporation formed by a public university system, and is governed by a nine-member board consisting of at least three members of the UT System Board of Regents, four members appointed by the UT System Board of Regents, three of which must have substantial background and expertise in investments, and two members appointed by the Texas A&M System Board of Regents, one of which must have a substantial background and expertise in investments.   The University of Texas System The UT System Board of Regents The Texas A&M University System The Texas A&M System Board of Regents UTIMCO At A Glance We were the first investment corporation formed by a public university system Our work impacts over 20 institutions across two of our nation's largest higher education systems Created March 1996 Manages the investment assets under the fiduciary care of the UT System Board of Regents Governed by a nine-member board consisting of at least three members of the UT System Board of Regents, four members appointed by the UT System Board of Regents, three of which must have substantial background and expertise in investments, and two members appointed by the Texas A&M System Board of Regents, one of which must have a substantial background and expertise in investments Day-to-day management responsibility for the investment assets is delegated to UTIMCO Diversified portfolio includes US and global equities, fixed income investments, natural resource, real estate, private equity, venture capital and hedge funds Partner with Us UTIMCO manages the largest public endowment fund in the nation, which is both a privilege, and a responsibility.
